name: Sweet and Sour Cabbage with Plantains
recipeIngredient: 1 Ripe medium plantain, cut into 1/4-inch slices
1/4 cup Red bell pepper, cut into 1-1/8-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix broth, brown sugar, vinegar, cornstarch, and red pepper sauce; reserve.
2. Heat oil in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add plantain, onions, and bell pepper; stir-fry for one minute.
4. Add cabbage; stir-fry for two minutes.
5. Stir in cornstarch mixture; cook and stir for ten seconds or until thickened.
